# Current invoicing tool is a spreadsheet template

Invoices go out from a manually maintained spreadsheet template; there is no
dedicated invoicing software in place yet, and reconciliation against
payments is done by hand at the end of each month.

*Nothing in the current ground truth directly contradicts this (no note
claims a different invoicing setup), but the note is old enough, and specific
enough about a tool choice, that it should be flagged "stale" (cite with
caveat) rather than trusted as still-current without a check. This is the
aging fixture that must be verdicted "stale", not escalated.*
